name: glm_multiline_file_write_array_20260510
notes: GLM emitted a full file write as a JSON-like shell command array whose third item contained raw newlines, so strict JSON parsing treated the command as a string and blocked it as malformed.

content.text: Create a complete cosmic dreamscape page in index.html.

Let me build this:<tool_call>shell<arg_key>command</arg_key><arg_value>["powershell", "-Command", "[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('index.html', @'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=\"en\"><body><canvas id=\"cosmos\"></canvas></body></html>
'@, \"utf8\")"]</arg_value><arg_key>workdir</arg_key><arg_value>C:\Users\example\source\repos\glm-test</arg_value></tool_call>
